entity.summary: Historical centralized cryptocurrency exchange preserved in external exchange registry data.
entity.notes: CoinPaprika preserves Bigmarkets Limited as an inactive exchange. A reliable first-party domain, jurisdiction, launch date, terminal date, and shutdown cause were not recovered in this review, so HEI leaves those fields unset rather than inferring them.

evidence.title: Bigmarkets Limited exchange registry entry
evidence.notes: Entity-specific registry entry preserves the Bigmarkets Limited exchange identity and inactive classification.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange registry corpus
evidence.notes: The exchange registry corpus independently preserves Bigmarkets Limited as a named exchange record. No first-party lifecycle date is inferred from this source.
